Annotation Interface Fabric8ClientIntegrationTest

@Target(TYPE) @Retention(RUNTIME) @Inherited @Documented @ContextConfiguration(initializers=K3sContextInitializer.class) @ExtendWith(FabricClientIntegrationTestExtension.class) public @interface Fabric8ClientIntegrationTest
Author:
wind57

  • Optional Element Summary

    Optional Elements
    Modifier and Type
    Optional Element
    Description
    String[]
    busyboxNamespaces
    in what namespaces must busybox be deployed.
    boolean
    deployConfigurationWatcher
    deploy or not configuration watcher.
    boolean
    deployExternalNameService
    deploy external-name-service.
    boolean
    deployIstio
    deploy istio.
    String[]
    namespaces
    what namespaces to create during this test.
    String[]
    rbacNamespaces
    in what namespaces to set-up RBAC.
    String[]
    wiremockNamespaces
    in what namespaces must wiremock be deployed.
    String[]
    withImages
    what image must be present in k3s.

  • Element Details

    • namespaces

      String[] namespaces
      what namespaces to create during this test.
      Default:
      {}

    • busyboxNamespaces

      String[] busyboxNamespaces
      in what namespaces must busybox be deployed.
      Default:
      {}

    • wiremockNamespaces

      String[] wiremockNamespaces
      in what namespaces must wiremock be deployed.
      Default:
      {}

    • withImages

      String[] withImages
      what image must be present in k3s.
      Default:
      {}

    • rbacNamespaces

      String[] rbacNamespaces
      in what namespaces to set-up RBAC.
      Default:
      {}

    • deployExternalNameService

      boolean deployExternalNameService
      deploy external-name-service.
      Default:
      false

    • deployIstio

      boolean deployIstio
      deploy istio.
      Default:
      false

    • deployConfigurationWatcher

      boolean deployConfigurationWatcher
      deploy or not configuration watcher.
      Default:
      false
